descripcion: A flaw was found in nano. In environments with permissive umask settings, a local attacker can exploit incorrect directory permissions (0777 instead of 0700) for the `~/.local` directory. This allows the attacker to inject a malicious `.desktop` launcher, which could lead to unintended actions or information disclosure if the launcher is subsequently processed. 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 2.50 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) LOW

In Progress® Telerik® UI for AJAX versions 2024.4.1114 through 2026.1.421, the RadFilter control is vulnerable to insecure deserialization when restoring filter state if the state is exposed to the client. If an attacker tampers with this state, a server-side remote code execution is possible. 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 8.10 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) HIGH

In Progress® Telerik® UI for AJAX prior to 2026.1.421, RadAsyncUpload contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows file uploads to exceed the configured maximum size due to missing cumulative size enforcement during chunk reassembly, leading to disk space exhaustion. 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 7.50 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) HIGH

Missing critical step in authentication in Apache HttpClient 5.6 allows an attacker to cause the client to accept SCRAM-SHA-256 authentication without proper mutual authentication verification. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 5.6.1, which fixes this issue. 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) Pendiente de análisis

Missing bounds validation for operator could allow out of range operator-code lookup during model loading Affected version is prior to commit 1.30.0. 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 5.50 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) MEDIUM
